summary: Iteration 9: Backend-only testing for Favorites System and Related Endpoints. All 16 tests PASSED (100% success rate). Tested: /api/user/favorites (POST toggle add/remove, GET list), /api/user/history (POST add, GET list), /api/stream/url (GET URL generation), /api/epg/batch (GET batch EPG), /api/health. MongoDB _id exclusion verified working.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request - React Native (Expo) app running via tunnel

critical_code_review_comments: server.py favorites POST (lines 347-358): Toggle logic correct - checks existing by username+stream_id, removes if found, adds if not. Returns {status: 'added'/'removed'}.
server.py favorites GET (lines 360-366): Correctly uses MongoDB projection {'_id': 0} to exclude ObjectId from response - serialization safe.
server.py history endpoints: Same pattern - _id excluded via projection. Upsert behavior working correctly.
server.py stream URL (lines 285-319): Generates correct URLs for live/movie/series with proper path structure and container extensions.
server.py batch EPG (lines 180-193): Correctly limits to 20 streams, has 150ms delay between requests to avoid 503 rate limiting.
All endpoints return proper status codes and structured JSON responses.
seed_data_creation: Test data auto-cleaned after each test class (TEST_ prefix pattern)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend favorites system fully functional: POST /api/user/favorites toggles add/remove based on username+stream_id, returns {status: 'added'/'removed'}. GET /api/user/favorites?username=X returns list without MongoDB _id. History endpoints work similarly. Stream URL generation produces correct Xtream Codes URLs. Batch EPG limited to 20 streams with rate limiting protection. No backend issues found - all endpoints production-ready.

verified_endpoints.notes: Returns list without _id, sorted by timestamp desc
